summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the new retreat detail page features: Book Now button, Your Rooms section, and Get Brochure form. All 14 test scenarios passed. Hero CTA changed from 'Request an Invite' to 'Book Now' which opens WhatsApp (wa.me/918595146962) with retreat details. New 'Your Rooms' section added after 'Your Stay' showing 2 room cards with images, titles, descriptions, and amenity tags. Bottom section changed from 'Request an Invite' form to 'Get Brochure' form with WhatsApp integration.
passed_tests: Hero 'Book Now' button is visible on /retreats/bali-2026
Hero 'Book Now' button is visible on /retreats/gulmarg-2027
Clicking 'Book Now' opens WhatsApp link (wa.me/918595146962) with correct retreat name, date, price in message
'Your Rooms' section is visible after 'Your Stay' on Bali retreat page with 2 room cards (Twin Sharing Room, Private Villa)
'Your Rooms' section is visible on Gulmarg retreat page with 2 room cards (Mountain View Room, Premium Cabin)
Room cards show image, title, description, and amenity tags (4 amenities per room)
'Get Brochure' section is visible at the bottom instead of 'Request an Invite'
Get Brochure form has fields: Name (required), Phone (required), Email (required), Message (optional)
Get Brochure form uses HTML5 validation for required fields
Get Brochure submit button says 'Get Brochure via WhatsApp' with WhatsApp green color (#25D366 / rgb(37, 211, 102))
Submitting Get Brochure form with valid data opens WhatsApp link with retreat name, date, price, user name, phone, email, and message
All other sections still work: At a Glance, Your Stay, What Awaits You, Inclusions/Exclusions, Itinerary, Gallery, Pricing
Navigation from /retreats to /retreats/bali-2026 via View Details button works
Navigation from /retreats to /retreats/gulmarg-2027 via View Details button works

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend only test - no backend calls for new features)

seed_data_creation: None - WhatsApp integration is client-side only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retreat Detail Page updated with 3 new features: 1) Hero CTA 'Book Now' opens WhatsApp (wa.me/918595146962) with retreat details via buildWhatsAppUrl() function. 2) 'Your Rooms' section (data-testid='your-rooms') shows room cards (data-testid='room-{idx}') with images, titles, descriptions, amenities from retreat.rooms array. 3) 'Get Brochure' section (data-testid='get-brochure') replaced 'Request an Invite' - form fields: brochure-name, brochure-phone, brochure-email (required), brochure-message (optional), brochure-submit. Form submission opens WhatsApp with all user details. No backend API calls - all client-side WhatsApp URL construction. Bali rooms: Twin Sharing Room, Private Villa. Gulmarg rooms: Mountain View Room, Premium Cabin.
